title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
description: Verify that a user can successfully create an account by providing a valid email and a password that meets the minimum length requirement of 8 characters.

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the email provided already exists in the system, enforcing the unique email business rule.

title: Account creation with password less than 8 characters is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password length is less than 8 characters, enforcing the minimum password length validation.

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters is accepted
description: Verify that a user can successfully create an account when the password is exactly 8 characters long, testing the lower boundary of the password length requirement.

title: Account creation with password of 7 characters is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password is 7 characters long, testing just below the minimum boundary of the password length requirement.

title: SQL injection attempt in email field during account creation
description: Verify that the system handles SQL injection attempts in the email field securely and does not allow account creation with malicious SQL payloads.

title: Cross-site scripting (XSS) attempt in email field during account creation
description: Verify that the system handles XSS attempts in the email field securely and does not allow account creation with malicious script payloads.

title: SQL injection attempt in password field during account creation
description: Verify that the system handles SQL injection attempts in the password field securely and does not allow account creation with malicious SQL payloads.

title: Cross-site scripting (XSS) attempt in password field during account creation
description: Verify that the system handles XSS attempts in the password field securely and does not allow account creation with malicious script payloads.
